problem_statement:
# All install_git_vcs tests are failing because of hardcoded commit SHA

### Description

All integration tests are currently failing because the pip-test-package project's HEAD is now at commit `96d6d72ac54132aecbdd5adac88bc8d1f8fb986b`, while the tests are hardcoded to use commit `5547fa909e83df8bd743d3978d6667497983a4b7`.


### Expected behavior

All tests should pass.

### pip version

25.1.1

### Python version

3.13.5

### OS

All operating systems

### How to Reproduce

1. Run /test/functional/test_install_vcs_git.py
2. Observe error.

### Output

_No response_
